notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to first baseman Mark Vientos. Mike Trout out at 3rd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to first baseman Mark Vientos. Mike Trout out at 3rd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a double play, shortstop Bo Bichette to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Austin Slater pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Slater called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Austin Slater pinch-hit
